creator: bugzilla.freebsd@omnilan.de
text:
Created attachment 193696
sys/dev/usb/usbdevs add product PHILIPS SPC900NC (0x0329)

15 year later, and after lots of highly appreciated contributions from HPS, this puppy works flawlessly (only video tested with multimedia/pwcview [requiring multimedia/webcamd and multimedia/cuse4bsd-kmod], audio/microphone attaches but I haven't used).

The device has no identification string so it's listed like
ugen0.7: <vendor 0x0471 product 0x0329> at usbus0, cfg=0 md=HOST spd=FULL (12Mbps) pwr=ON (500mA)

This patch simply adds the descriptive string for the product ID.

-harry
